reviews.comment:
La infladora para las llantas esta rota, nadie nos aviso. El pico esta fallado, o se rompio, una de dos. Estuvimos 15m intentando inflar, no habia ni un cartel ni nadie nos aviso, en un momento me di cuenta que en vez de inflar estaba desinflando. Tuve que cambiar la llanta por la de auxilio, no hay una sola gomeria abierta en fin de semana. Uno de los playeros se acerco a ayudar, fue un divino, pero no puede ser que sepan que esta roto y ni te avisen. Me desinflo entera la llanta, que inviable todo.

(Translated by Google)
The tire pump is broken, and no one told us. The nozzle is faulty or broken, one of two things. We spent 15 minutes trying to pump it up; there was no sign and no one told us. At one point, I realized it was deflating instead of inflating. I had to replace the tire with the spare; there isn't a single tire shop open on weekends. One of the beach attendants came to help; he was a godsend, but it's impossible for them to know it's broken and not even tell you. He deflated my entire tire, which is impossible.
